🎨 Artisan Favorite 🎁 Perfect for Gifting

Persian Love

Our signature creation. A love letter in every bite.

₹149 per cookie

Inspired by Persian confectionery traditions, this cookie combines aromatic cardamom with a delicate almond base. Finished with fresh lemon-rose icing and crushed pistachios, each bite is a journey through ancient spice routes.

🧈 Real Butter
🌿 No Preservatives
🚚 Same-Day Delivery
The Story

A Cookie with Heritage

The Persian Love cookie was born from a desire to bring the warmth of Middle Eastern hospitality to Bangalore. We spent months perfecting the balance of cardamom—enough to evoke Persian tea houses, but not so much as to overwhelm the delicate almond base.

The lemon-rose icing is made fresh each morning, using rose water from local suppliers. The final touch—crushed pistachios—adds color, crunch, and a connection to the traditions that inspired this cookie.

What's Inside

Ingredients

Almond Flour California almonds, finely ground
Real Butter Local dairy
Cardamom Kerala green cardamom, freshly ground
Rose Water Natural, food-grade essence
Lemon Zest Fresh lemons
Pistachios Premium Indian pista
Allergen Information: Contains tree nuts (almonds, pistachios), dairy, eggs, gluten.
